rationale: Bug hunt on C9 code found BUG-026 HIGH: race condition between ogham activation (async dispatch) and choice press in encounter_card_overlay.gd. Player could press choice during await, triggering queue_free before dispatch returns, crashing on freed nodes. Fixed with _locked mutex guard + is_inside_tree() post-await check. Feature: WalkHUD enhanced with card counter showing encounter progress, floating life-change text with rise-and-fade animation for visceral feedback, and compact faction tier indicators at bottom-right.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 10 code (walk_hud enhancements, forest integration). Then: reward badge preview on card choice hover — show HEAL/DAMAGE/REP icons before selecting, using MerlinConstants.REWARD_TYPES.
